creator: m.seaman@infracaninophile.co.uk
text:
From the announce message:

"Welcome to phpMyAdmin 2.11.5.1, a security fix version.

Security announcement:
http://www.phpmyadmin.net/home_page/security.php?issue=PMASA-2008-2

The release notes and download info are available on
http://www.phpmyadmin.net.

Marc Delisle, for the team."

Release notes are at: https://sourceforge.net/project/shownotes.php?release_id=587963
